MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, is present. Represented by Leona Lucket
Attorney,Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Frank Johnson, is present.
Attorney, Niki Bawa, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Al Anolik, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-15-2010 is vacated.
